description.p: A small, secure diary. Every entry is automatically timestamped and stored encrypted with your master password (AES via Fernet, key derived with scrypt).

ul.li: Write entries with automatic timestamps and simple Markdown formatting
Entry list with click to read and delete with confirmation
End-to-end encryption with a master password
Portable single-file vault stored at a location you choose
Menu bar to create, open (import) and export diary files
Modern welcome, unlock and create screens using Adwaita status pages
Manage multiple diary vaults: switch, add and remove from a dedicated dialog
Live Markdown preview while writing — formatting is applied as you type
Formatting toolbar with icon buttons in linked groups
Card-style editor area and constrained password field width
Today's date shown as subtitle in the main header
Entries heading with count in the sidebar

description.p: Portable single-file vault that you can store at any location of your choice. New welcome screen to create or open a diary, and a menu bar to create, open and export diary files. Flatpak-only build.
First release: encrypted entries, search, GTK4 interface.
